components.name: Embedding
components.description: Token embedding lookup table

components.name: Linear
components.description: Learnable linear transformation: y = xW^T + b

components.name: Conv2D
components.description: 2D convolution with learnable filters

components.name: Conv2D Transpose
components.description: 2D transposed convolution (upsampling)

components.name: MaxPool2D
components.description: 2D max pooling

components.name: Flatten
components.description: Flatten spatial dims to vector

components.name: BatchNorm
components.description: Batch normalization

components.name: LayerNorm
components.description: Layer normalization (mean + variance)

components.name: RMSNorm
components.description: Root Mean Square Layer Normalization

components.name: Dropout
components.description: Dropout regularization

components.name: RNN Layer
components.description: Vanilla RNN: h = tanh(Wx + Wh + b)

components.name: LSTM Layer
components.description: LSTM with forget/input/output gates

components.name: Mamba Block
components.description: Selective SSM — linear-time sequence modeling

components.name: Liquid Cell
components.description: Liquid Time-Constant — continuous dynamics with input-dependent tau

components.name: RoPE
components.description: Rotary Positional Encoding

components.name: SwiGLU FFN
components.description: SwiGLU gated feed-forward network

components.name: MoE Layer
components.description: Mixture of Experts — router + top-k SwiGLU experts

components.name: Multi-Head Attention
components.description: Multi-head self-attention with QKV

components.name: Bidirectional Attention
components.description: Full attention without causal mask (LLaDA-style)

components.name: Cross Attention
components.description: Q from decoder, K/V from encoder context

components.name: GQA Attention
components.description: Grouped Query Attention with RoPE (Qwen-style)

components.name: RoPE Attention
components.description: Multi-head attention with Rotary Positional Encoding

components.name: GAT Layer
components.description: Graph Attention Network layer

components.name: Orthogonal Transform
components.description: Fixed orthogonal rotation Q from SO(d) — non-learned, norm-preserving

components.name: Transformer Block
components.description: LLaMA-style: RMSNorm -> RoPE Attn -> Residual -> RMSNorm -> SwiGLU -> Residual

components.name: LLaDA Block
components.description: Diffusion transformer: bidirectional attention + SwiGLU

components.name: Qwen Block
components.description: Qwen-style: GQA + RoPE + SwiGLU

components.name: MoE Transformer Block
components.description: Mixtral-style: RoPE Attn + MoE FFN (8 experts, top-2)

components.name: TimeEmbedding
components.description: Sinusoidal time embedding for diffusion steps

components.name: NoiseSchedule
components.description: Parameterized β/α noise schedule (linear or cosine)

components.name: PredictionHead
components.description: Norm + linear projection head for diffusion models (ε / x0 / v)

components.name: CFGDropout
components.description: Training-time conditional dropout for classifier-free guidance

components.name: PCGenerativeHead
components.description: Per-layer top-down predictor for predictive coding

components.name: PCStateUpdate
components.description: Local PC update: x ← x − α·(e_top − e_bottom)

components.name: WitnessHead
components.description: Calibrated confidence scalar over (step k, latent)

components.name: HaltDecision
components.description: PonderNet-style differentiable halt probability

components.name: TrajectoryRecorder
components.description: Ring-buffer recorder for (k, x_k, conf_k) denoising trajectories

components.name: ExtractOperator
components.description: Extracts latent at halt step from trajectory buffer

components.name: GraphAttentionDiffusion
components.description: Iterated GAT with diffusion-style skip-connection updates

components.name: GraphRetrieval
components.description: Top-k semantic node retrieval via learned query/key projection

components.name: TagEmbedding
components.description: Semantic tag embedding lookup for weight pockets

components.name: DualTrackCombiner
components.description: Combines converged and partial-denoising states via witness gate

components.name: DROGAActor
components.description: Curriculum-conditioned action head over candidate state distribution

components.name: OutcomePredictor
components.description: Predicts expected outcome distribution at action commit for PC error injection
